note: Goblin ambush · multi-agent orchestration. world-agent is Layer 1 (DM): manages turns, calls referee for dice, writes results back to run_state + HP, acts for the goblin, narrates. referee only rolls dice and returns JSON; world-agent persists.

agents.name: Dungeon Master
agents.role: Layer 1 — DM: turn scheduling + write state back + narration
agents.description: Manages initiative order and turns, calls referee for dice (initiative/attack/damage), **writes results back to run_state's initiative_order + party/npc HP**, acts for the goblin per its tactics, stops on each adventurer turn to wait for the player, narrates combat. All player input passes through it.

agents.name: Dice Referee (5e)
agents.description: Rolls initiative (d20+initiative mod), attack rolls (d20+to_hit vs AC, nat20 crit doubles, nat1 auto-miss), damage dice. Returns structured JSON, never writes prose, never persists (world-agent writes HP/state). Temp 0.2.
